name: eslint-wrap: on first invocation, installs the eslint_plugin_npm package into node_modules; subsequent runs cached
command: mkdir -p node_modules && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/wrap-eslint.sh" --rule-id g-react-002 --eslint-rule react-hooks/exhaustive-deps --eslint-plugin-npm eslint-plugin-react-hooks --eslint-plugin-version 4.6.0 --paths "src/**/*.tsx" 2>out.txt && grep -E "npm install|installed" out.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
setup: mkdir -p src && printf 'import {useEffect} from "react";\nfunction X(){useEffect(()=>{},[])}\n' > src/x.tsx
